faq.q: What is the best time to visit Deopani Durga Mandir?
faq.a: The best time to visit Deopani Durga Mandir is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Deopani Durga Mandir?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dimapur Airport (38 km) and the nearest railway station is Dimapur Railway Station (36 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Deopani Durga Mandir?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Deopani Durga Mandir at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Deopani Durga Mandir?
faq.a: Stays in Deopani Durga Mandir start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Deopani Durga Mandir?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sarupathar, Barpathar.
